tasks.command: mkdir -p .reports && git ls-files -z --cached --others --exclude-standard '*.yml' '*.yaml' | xargs -0 -r yamllint -c .validate/.yamllint | tee .reports/yaml_lint.txt; echo ""; if [ ! -s ".reports/yaml_lint.txt" ]; then echo -e "\033[1;32m✔  YAML Lint: PASSED\033[0m"; else echo -e "\033[1;31m✖  YAML Lint: FAILED\033[0m"; fi
tasks.label: YAML: Lint Project

tasks.command: mkdir -p .reports && git ls-files -z --cached --others --exclude-standard '*.json' | xargs -0 -r check-jsonschema --schemafile https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema | tee .reports/json_validation.txt; echo ""; if grep -q "ok -- validation done" .reports/json_validation.txt 2>/dev/null; then echo -e "\033[1;32m✔  JSON: PASSED\033[0m"; else echo -e "\033[1;31m✖  JSON: FAILED\033[0m"; fi
tasks.label: JSON: Verify All Files

tasks.command: [ "${config:project.category}" = "theme" ] && echo "[Skipped: integration only]" || { mkdir -p .reports && git ls-files -z --cached --others --exclude-standard 'manifest.json' '**/manifest.json' | xargs -0 -r check-jsonschema --schemafile .validate/ha_manifest_schema.json | tee .reports/ha_manifest_validation.txt; echo ""; if grep -q "ok -- validation done" .reports/ha_manifest_validation.txt 2>/dev/null; then echo -e "\033[1;32m✔  HA Manifest: PASSED\033[0m"; else echo -e "\033[1;31m✖  HA Manifest: FAILED\033[0m"; fi; }
tasks.label: HA: Verify Manifest

tasks.command: [ "${config:project.category}" = "theme" ] && echo "[Skipped: integration only]" || { mkdir -p .reports && HOST_PATH=$(docker inspect $(hostname) | python3 -c "import json,sys,re; binds=json.load(sys.stdin)[0]['HostConfig']['Binds']; cw='/workspaces/${workspaceFolderBasename}'; result=next((p[0].replace(chr(92),'/') for b in binds for p in [re.split(r'(?<=[^:]):/',b, maxsplit=1)] if len(p)==2 and ('/'+p[1]).split(':')[0]==cw),None); print(result) if result else exit(1)") && docker run --rm -v "$HOST_PATH:/github/workspace" ghcr.io/home-assistant/hassfest:latest | tee .reports/hassfest.txt; echo ""; if grep -q "Invalid integrations: 0" .reports/hassfest.txt 2>/dev/null; then echo -e "\033[1;32m✔  Hassfest: PASSED\033[0m"; else echo -e "\033[1;31m✖  Hassfest: FAILED\033[0m"; fi; }
tasks.label: HA: Hassfest Validation

tasks.command: [ "${config:project.category}" = "theme" ] && echo "[Skipped: integration only]" || { mkdir -p .reports && python3 .workbench/iqs_static_check.py --component ${config:project.componentName}; echo ""; if grep -q "IQS Static: PASSED" .reports/iqs_static.txt 2>/dev/null; then echo -e "\033[1;32m✔  IQS Static: PASSED\033[0m"; else echo -e "\033[1;31m✖  IQS Static: FAILED (report-only — see .reports/iqs_static.txt)\033[0m"; fi; }
tasks.label: IQS: Static Check

tasks.command: mkdir -p .reports && check-jsonschema --schemafile .validate/hacs_schema.json hacs.json | tee .reports/hacs_validation.txt; echo ""; if grep -q "ok -- validation done" .reports/hacs_validation.txt 2>/dev/null; then echo -e "\033[1;32m✔  HACS: PASSED\033[0m"; else echo -e "\033[1;31m✖  HACS: FAILED\033[0m"; fi
tasks.label: HACS: Verify Manifest

tasks.command: mkdir -p .reports && hass --script check_config --config /config | tee .reports/ha_check_config.txt; echo ""; if ! grep -qi "error" .reports/ha_check_config.txt 2>/dev/null; then echo -e "\033[1;32m✔  HA Check Config: PASSED\033[0m"; else echo -e "\033[1;31m✖  HA Check Config: FAILED\033[0m"; fi
tasks.label: HA: Check Config

tasks.command: [ "${config:project.category}" = "theme" ] && echo "[Skipped: integration only]" || { mkdir -p .reports && ruff check . | tee .reports/ruff_lint.txt; echo ""; if grep -q "All checks passed" .reports/ruff_lint.txt 2>/dev/null; then echo -e "\033[1;32m✔  Ruff Lint: PASSED\033[0m"; else echo -e "\033[1;31m✖  Ruff Lint: FAILED\033[0m"; fi; }
tasks.label: Ruff: Check (Lint Only)

tasks.command: [ "${config:project.category}" = "theme" ] && echo "[Skipped: integration only]" || { mkdir -p .reports && ruff format --check . | tee .reports/ruff_format_status.txt; echo ""; if grep -q "already formatted" .reports/ruff_format_status.txt 2>/dev/null; then echo -e "\033[1;32m✔  Ruff Format: PASSED\033[0m"; else echo -e "\033[1;31m✖  Ruff Format: FAILED\033[0m"; fi; }
tasks.label: Ruff: Format Check (View Only)

tasks.command: [ "${config:project.category}" = "theme" ] && echo "[Skipped: integration only]" || ruff format . || true
tasks.label: Ruff: Format Fix (Auto-Repair)

tasks.command: [ "${config:project.category}" = "theme" ] && echo "[Skipped: integration only]" || ruff check --fix . || true
tasks.label: Ruff: Check Fix (Auto-Repair Lint)

tasks.command: mkdir -p .reports && markdown-link-check --config .validate/.mlc_config.json README.md | tee .reports/markdown_link_check.txt; echo ""; if ! grep -q "✖" .reports/markdown_link_check.txt 2>/dev/null; then echo -e "\033[1;32m✔  Markdown Links: PASSED\033[0m"; else echo -e "\033[1;31m✖  Markdown Links: FAILED\033[0m"; fi
tasks.label: Markdown: Check Links

tasks.command: mkdir -p .reports && git ls-files -z --cached --others --exclude-standard '*.md' | xargs -0 -r markdownlint --config .validate/.markdownlint.json 2>&1 | tee .reports/markdown_lint.txt; echo ""; if [ ! -s ".reports/markdown_lint.txt" ]; then echo -e "\033[1;32m✔  Markdown Lint: PASSED\033[0m"; else echo -e "\033[1;31m✖  Markdown Lint: FAILED\033[0m"; fi
tasks.label: Markdown: Lint (View Only)

tasks.command: git ls-files -z --cached --others --exclude-standard '*.md' | xargs -0 -r markdownlint --config .validate/.markdownlint.json --fix || true
tasks.label: Markdown: Lint (Auto-Fix)

tasks.command: mkdir -p .reports && codespell . | tee .reports/codespell.txt; echo ""; if [ ! -s ".reports/codespell.txt" ]; then echo -e "\033[1;32m✔  Codespell: PASSED\033[0m"; else echo -e "\033[1;31m✖  Codespell: FAILED\033[0m"; fi
tasks.label: Codespell: Check (View Only)

tasks.command: codespell . -w || true
tasks.label: Codespell: Fix (Auto-Repair)

tasks.command: mkdir -p .reports && git ls-files -z --cached --others --exclude-standard '*.md' '*.json' '*.yaml' '*.yml' | xargs -0 -r prettier --config .validate/.prettierrc.json --check | tee .reports/prettier_check.txt; echo ""; if grep -q "Prettier code style" .reports/prettier_check.txt 2>/dev/null; then echo -e "\033[1;32m✔  Prettier: PASSED\033[0m"; else echo -e "\033[1;31m✖  Prettier: FAILED\033[0m"; fi
tasks.label: Prettier: Check (View Only)

tasks.command: git ls-files -z --cached --others --exclude-standard '*.md' '*.json' '*.yaml' '*.yml' | xargs -0 -r prettier --config .validate/.prettierrc.json --write || true
tasks.label: Prettier: Format (Auto-Fix)

tasks.command: prettier --config .validate/.prettierrc.json --ignore-path /dev/null --write ".notes/**/*.{md,json,yaml,yml}" || true
tasks.label: Prettier: Fix Notes

tasks.command: prettier --config .validate/.prettierrc.json --ignore-path /dev/null --write ".shared/**/*.{md,json,yaml,yml}" || true
tasks.label: Prettier: Fix Shared

tasks.command: [ "${config:project.category}" = "theme" ] && echo "[Skipped: integration only]" || { mkdir -p .reports && mypy custom_components/ | tee .reports/mypy_check.txt; echo ""; if grep -q "Success:" .reports/mypy_check.txt 2>/dev/null; then echo -e "\033[1;32m✔  Mypy Standard: PASSED\033[0m"; else echo -e "\033[1;31m✖  Mypy Standard: FAILED\033[0m"; fi; }
tasks.label: Mypy: Check (Standard)

tasks.command: [ "${config:project.category}" = "theme" ] && echo "[Skipped: integration only]" || { mkdir -p .reports && mypy custom_components/ --strict | tee .reports/mypy_strict.txt; echo ""; if grep -q "Success:" .reports/mypy_strict.txt 2>/dev/null; then echo -e "\033[1;32m✔  Mypy Strict: PASSED\033[0m"; else echo -e "\033[1;31m✖  Mypy Strict: FAILED\033[0m"; fi; }
tasks.label: Mypy: Strict Check

tasks.command: mkdir -p .reports && if [ -f .pre-commit-config.yaml ]; then FORCE_COLOR=1 pre-commit run zizmor --all-files | tee >(sed -e 's/.*\r//g' -e 's/\x1b\[[0-9;]*[a-zA-Z]//g' -e 's/\x1b\][^\x1b]*\x1b\\//g' -e 's/\x1b\][^\x07]*\x07//g' -e 's/\x1b(B//g' > .reports/zizmor_audit.txt); else zizmor --pedantic .github/ | tee .reports/zizmor_audit.txt; fi
tasks.label: Zizmor: GitHub Actions Audit

tasks.command: zizmor --fix .github/ || true
tasks.label: Zizmor: Fix (Safe Auto-Fix)

tasks.command: [ "${config:project.category}" = "theme" ] && echo "[Skipped: integration only]" || python-typing-update --py311-plus --force --keep-updates custom_components/${config:project.componentName}/ || true
tasks.label: Python: Update Typing Syntax (Maintenance)

tasks.command: [ "${config:project.category}" = "theme" ] && echo "[Skipped: integration only]" || { mkdir -p .reports && uv run --with awesomeversion python3 -c "import json; from awesomeversion import AwesomeVersion; v = json.load(open('custom_components/${config:project.componentName}/manifest.json'))['version']; av = AwesomeVersion(v); print(f'Version {v} detected strategy: {av.strategy}'); exit(1 if av.strategy == 'unknown' else 0)" | tee .reports/version_validation.txt; echo ""; if [ -s ".reports/version_validation.txt" ] && ! grep -q "unknown" .reports/version_validation.txt 2>/dev/null; then echo -e "\033[1;32m✔  HA Version: PASSED\033[0m"; else echo -e "\033[1;31m✖  HA Version: FAILED\033[0m"; fi; }
tasks.label: HA: Verify Version (AwesomeVersion)

tasks.command: [ "${config:project.category}" = "theme" ] && echo "[Skipped: integration only]" || { mkdir -p .reports && PYTHONPATH=. pytest tests/ -W ignore::DeprecationWarning --color=yes --junitxml=.reports/pytest_results.xml | tee >(sed 's/\x1b\[[0-9;]*[a-zA-Z]//g' > .reports/pytest_results.txt); }
tasks.label: Pytest: Run All Tests

tasks.command: [ "${config:project.category}" = "theme" ] && echo "[Skipped: integration only]" || { mkdir -p .reports && PYTHONPATH=. pytest --cov --cov-report=term-missing --cov-report=html:.reports/coverage --color=yes tests/ | tee >(sed 's/\x1b\[[0-9;]*[a-zA-Z]//g' > .reports/pytest_coverage.txt); }
tasks.label: Pytest: Check Test Coverage

tasks.command: [ "${config:project.category}" = "theme" ] && echo "[Skipped: integration only]" || { mkdir -p .reports && FORCE_COLOR=1 pre-commit run --all-files | tee >(sed -e 's/.*\r//g' -e 's/\x1b\[[0-9;]*[a-zA-Z]//g' -e 's/\x1b\][^\x1b]*\x1b\\//g' -e 's/\x1b\][^\x07]*\x07//g' -e 's/\x1b(B//g' > .reports/precommit_all.txt); }
tasks.label: Pre-commit: Fix + Check All

tasks.command: [ "${config:project.category}" = "theme" ] && echo "[Skipped: integration only]" || { mkdir -p .reports && FORCE_COLOR=1 pre-commit run | tee >(sed -e 's/.*\r//g' -e 's/\x1b\[[0-9;]*[a-zA-Z]//g' -e 's/\x1b\][^\x1b]*\x1b\\//g' -e 's/\x1b\][^\x07]*\x07//g' -e 's/\x1b(B//g' > .reports/precommit_staged.txt); }
tasks.label: Pre-commit: Fix + Check Staged

tasks.command: G='\033[1;32m'; R='\033[1;31m'; Y='\033[1;33m'; N='\033[0m'; chk() { local lbl="$1" f=".reports/$2" pat="$3" result=""; if [ ! -f "$f" ]; then echo -e "  ${Y}?${N}  $lbl (not run)"; elif [ -z "$pat" ] && [ ! -s "$f" ]; then echo -e "  ${G}✔${N}  $lbl (no issues)"; elif [ -n "$pat" ] && grep -q "$pat" "$f"; then result=$(grep "$pat" "$f" | tail -1); echo -e "  ${G}✔${N}  $lbl $result"; else result=$(tail -1 "$f"); echo -e "  ${R}✖${N}  $lbl $result"; fi; }; echo ""; echo -e "\033[1m══════════════════════════════════════\033[0m"; echo -e "\033[1m       Validate All — Summary        \033[0m"; echo -e "\033[1m══════════════════════════════════════\033[0m"; chk "Hassfest          " hassfest.txt "Invalid integrations: 0"; chk "IQS Static        " iqs_static.txt "IQS Static: PASSED"; chk "Pytest            " pytest_results.txt " passed"; chk "Mypy Standard     " mypy_check.txt "Success:"; chk "Mypy Strict       " mypy_strict.txt "Success:"; chk "Ruff Lint         " ruff_lint.txt "All checks passed"; chk "Ruff Format       " ruff_format_status.txt "already formatted"; chk "YAML Lint         " yaml_lint.txt ""; chk "Codespell         " codespell.txt ""; chk "Markdown Lint     " markdown_lint.txt ""; echo ""
tasks.label: Show: Results Summary

tasks.command: [ "${config:project.category}" = "theme" ] && echo "[Skipped: integration only]" || pre-commit autoupdate
tasks.label: Env: Autoupdate Pre-commit Hooks

tasks.command: mkdir -p .reports
tasks.label: Initialize Reports

tasks.command: mkdir -p .reports && sh .workbench/sync_shared_files.sh | tee .reports/sync_shared_files.txt
tasks.label: Env: Sync Shared Files

tasks.command: mkdir -p .reports && python3 .workbench/check_tool_drift.py | tee .reports/tool_drift_raw.txt && sed -e 's/.*\r//g' -e 's/\x1b\[[0-9;]*[a-zA-Z]//g' .reports/tool_drift_raw.txt > .reports/tool_drift.txt && rm .reports/tool_drift_raw.txt
tasks.label: Env: Audit Version Drift

tasks.command: mkdir -p .reports && python3 .workbench/check_tool_drift.py -nocache | tee .reports/tool_drift_raw.txt && sed -e 's/.*\r//g' -e 's/\x1b\[[0-9;]*[a-zA-Z]//g' .reports/tool_drift_raw.txt > .reports/tool_drift.txt && rm .reports/tool_drift_raw.txt
tasks.label: Env: Audit Version Drift (no cache)

tasks.command: python3 .workbench/check_tool_drift.py --apply
tasks.label: Env: Apply Version Matrix Targets

tasks.command: python3 .workbench/check_tool_drift.py --absorb
tasks.label: Env: Absorb Pre-commit Bumps

tasks.command: [ "${config:project.category}" = "theme" ] && echo "[Skipped: integration only]" || { mkdir -p .reports && (echo 'Fetching latest upstream commits...' && rm -rf /tmp/ha_core_fetch && git -c init.defaultBranch=master init --bare /tmp/ha_core_fetch >/dev/null && mkdir -p /tmp/ha_core_fetch/objects/info && echo '/ha_core/.git/objects' > /tmp/ha_core_fetch/objects/info/alternates && git -C /tmp/ha_core_fetch fetch --quiet https://github.com/home-assistant/core.git dev && echo '=== Local HA Core dev Commit ===' && git -C /ha_core log -1 --format='%cd (%h) - %s' dev && echo '=== Upstream HA Core dev Commit ===' && git -C /tmp/ha_core_fetch log -1 --format='%cd (%h) - %s' FETCH_HEAD) | tee .reports/ha_core_staleness.txt; }
tasks.label: Env: Check HA Core Stub Staleness

tasks.command: [ "${config:project.category}" = "theme" ] && echo "[Skipped: integration only]" || { echo '=== HA Core is Mounted Read-Only inside the Dev Container ===' && echo 'To pull latest, please run the following command in a host terminal:' && echo '  git -C C:/Local/Code/ha_core/core pull https://github.com/home-assistant/core.git dev'; }
tasks.label: Env: Show HA Core Stub Pull Commands

dependsOn: Env: Check HA Core Stub Staleness
tasks.label: Env: [Workflow] Sync & Audit
